category.scope_note: Portable lithium batteries and power bank compliance comparison for China exports to the UAE.

title.en: China-to-UAE Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against UAE requirements: MoIAT/ESMA ECAS and EQM route, UAE.S/GSO-aligned safety expectations, IEC 62133, EMC and import-market entry, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer/registrant model.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源文件与阿联酋要求对照：MoIAT/ESMA ECAS及EQM路径、UAE.S/GSO 采纳安全要求、IEC 62133、EMC与市场准入、UN 38.3运输、以及境内进口商/注册人制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源檔案與阿聯酋要求對照：MoIAT/ESMA ECAS及EQM路徑、UAE.S/GSO採納安全要求、IEC 62133、EMC與市場准入、UN 38.3運輸、以及境內進口商/登記人制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal, customs, customs-broker, technical, and logistics advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs clearance outcome, dangerous-goods acceptance, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规可能变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律、海关、报关、技术及物流顾问核实所有要求。 本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、清关结果、危险品承运接受或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規可能變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律、海關、報關、技術及物流顧問核實所有要求。 本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、清關結果、危險品承運接受或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: For China-made lithium batteries and power banks entering the UAE, the confirmed practical gaps are MoIAT/ESMA ECAS scope mapping, in-country importer or registrant involvement, UAE.S and GSO-referenced safety expectations via IEC 62133 and related EMC expectations, and UN 38.3 transport evidence. China GB/CNS/CCC documents are useful engineering support but are not an automatic UAE market-access substitute; model-level gap analysis and destination-side registration and readiness are required before shipping to Jebel Ali or Khalifa.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造锂电池/移动电源进入阿联酋的实务差距是：MoIAT/ESMA ECAS适用范围确认、境内进口商/注册人参与、依据UAE.S与GSO的IEC 62133安全与EMC预期，以及UN 38.3运输证据。中国GB/CNS/CCC资料只能作为工程支持，不能自动替代阿联酋市场准入；在发运至杰贝阿里港或哈利法港前需完成型号级差距分析及境内注册和项目方确认。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造鋰電池/行動電源進入阿聯酋的實務差距為：MoIAT/ESMA ECAS適用範圍確認、境內進口商/登記人參與、依據UAE.S與GSO的IEC 62133安全與EMC預期，以及UN 38.3運輸證據。中國GB/CNS/CCC資料只能作為工程支持，不能自動替代阿聯酋市場准入；於發運至傑貝阿里港或哈利法港前需完成型號級差距分析及境內註冊和項目方確認。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Refresh rows when official MoIAT/ESMA, UAE.S/GSO, UNECE, or UN model-regulation text changes. Keep source URLs and accessed date updated per revision.
